message:
docs(readme): overhaul README with install command, quick examples, and accuracy corrections

Major documentation refresh bringing the README in line with current
project state:

- Add one-liner curl install command at the top for quick onboarding
- Add "Quick Example" section demonstrating 6 common usage patterns
  (interactive, codebase query, file attach, single-shot, continue, models)
- Update binary size claim from ~15MB to <22MB (CI-gated budget)
- Correct release profile description: opt-level=z → opt-level=3
  (speed-oriented, not size-optimized)
- Update default model from claude-sonnet-4 to claude-opus-4-5 with
  multi-provider auto-select fallback chain
- Mark rg as required (was optional) for the grep tool
- Replace hardcoded extension compatibility percentages with pointer to
  docs/ext-compat.md and pipeline reports directory
- Update CARGO_TARGET_DIR/TMPDIR paths to /data/tmp convention
- Refresh latest run snapshot to 2026-02-14 pipeline output with
  accurate stage/verdict breakdown and harness gap acknowledgment
- Add Math-Driven Decision Systems section documenting CUSUM + BOCPD
  regime-shift detection and conformal prediction envelope
- Update SDK references and drop-in parity language to reflect current
  gap ledger approach
- Tone down marketing language (rock-solid → stable, battle-tested → removed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
